reports.summary: Great job maintaining Blood Glucose, Breathing Health, Speech & Communication, Emotional Wellbeing, Posture Health! Focus areas for improvement: Heart Health. Follow the recommendations below to support your rehabilitation journey.

posture.title: Posture Health
exercises: Chin tucks: Pull chin back (10 reps, 3x/day)
Neck stretches: Gentle side-to-side and up-down
Upper back strengthening: Rows and reverse flies
lifestyle: Adjust screen height to eye level
tips: Forward head posture is very common with screen use

glucose.title: Blood Glucose

breathing.title: Breathing Health
exercises: Diaphragmatic breathing: Breathe deeply into belly (5-10 min, 3x/day)
Box breathing: Inhale 4s, hold 4s, exhale 4s, hold 4s
tips: Shallow breathing detected - focus on deep breaths
Your lungs can hold more air with practice

lifestyle: Adjust screen height to eye level
tips: Forward head posture is very common with screen use

Great job maintaining Blood Glucose, Speech & Communication! Focus areas for improvement: Heart Health, Breathing Health, Emotional Wellbeing, Posture Health. Follow the recommendations below to support your rehabilitation journey.

heartbeat.title: Heart Health
tips: Focus on relaxation and calm activities

glucose.title: Blood Glucose
exercises: Mix of cardio and strength training

breathing.title: Breathing Health
exercises: Paced breathing: Count to 4 on inhale, 6 on exhale

emotion.title: Emotional Wellbeing
tips: These feelings are valid and temporary
Support is available - you don't have to go through this alone

posture.title: Posture Health
exercises: Back extensions: Superman pose (10 reps, 2 sets)
lifestyle: Practice sitting tall with shoulders back
tips: Slouching puts stress on your spine
Building core strength helps maintain posture

interpretation.articulation: Unclear articulation – may need speech therapy focus
interpretation.pauses: Frequent pauses – may indicate word-finding difficulty
